name: Kitchenaid Pie Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt into a bowl.
2. Cut shortening and butter into 4 to 5 pieces and drop into the bowl.
3. Attach the bowl and flat beater. Turn to Stir Speed and cut shortening into flour until particles are about the size of small peas, approximately 30 seconds.
4. Add water, one tablespoon at a time, until all particles are moistened. Use only enough water to make the pastry form a ball. Watch dough closely as over mixing will result in a tough crust.
5. Chill in refrigerator for 15 minutes. Roll to 1/8-inch thickness between pieces of wax paper. Fold pastry into quarters; ease into pie plate and unfold, pressing firmly against bottom and side. Trim and crimp edges.
6. Fill and bake as desired.
Yield: Two 8 or 9-inch single crusts or one 8 or 9-inch double crust.
For Baked Pastry Shell: Prick sides and bottom with fork. Bake at 450°F for 8 to 10 minutes until light brown. Cool completely before filling.
